esp8266_dnsserver_start.message0: Start DNS server port %1 domain name %2 pointing to IP %3
esp8266_dnsserver_start.tooltip: Start the DNS server and resolve the specified domain name to the specified IP (for captive portal, etc.)

esp8266_dnsserver_start_captive.message0: Start the captive portal DNS server (all domain names point to this machine)
esp8266_dnsserver_start_captive.tooltip: Start the DNS server and resolve all domain name requests to the ESP8266 native IP

esp8266_dnsserver_process.tooltip: Called in the loop to handle DNS requests

esp8266_dnsserver_set_ttl.tooltip: Set the TTL (time to live) of DNS responses
